name: docx_insert
description: Insert new content after or before an existing paragraph. Content accepts Markdown — headings, blockquotes, horizontal rules, bullet/numbered/task-list (`- [ ]`/`- [x]`) items, and inline bold/italic/code — or plain text; returns one fresh anchor per inserted paragraph. Use docx_read or docx_outline first to find the position anchor.

after.description: Insert after this paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Provide exactly one of after or before.

before.description: Insert before this paragraph anchor like 'P12#e7f8'. Provide exactly one of after or before.

content.description: Markdown (multi-paragraph, headings, lists) or plain text.

author.description: Revision author when track_changes is true. Defaults from environment.
